---
title: Research
listing:
  sort-ui: false
  categories: false
  filter-ui: false
  template: theme/ejs/research.ejs
  contents:
    - src/publications.yml
execute:
  freeze: true
---

The following is a list of my publications and preprints. A complete list can be found on [Google Scholar](https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=7TQaHEEAAAAJ&hl=en).

::: {#publications}
:::
